original_text: Revenue concentration and margin sustainability present potential risk factors, as projected revenue of $215.94 billion in FY2026 represents substantial expansion that may be difficult to sustain at similar rates [cdffc354-305b-4c6d-9459-624d8d18147a].
revised_text: Revenue concentration and margin sustainability present potential risk factors, as reported revenue of $215.94 billion in FY2026 represents substantial expansion that may be difficult to sustain at similar rates [cdffc354-305b-4c6d-9459-624d8d18147a, 93b368f3-dee2-424f-8a66-93f166f9b1f8].
changes_summary: Changed 'projected revenue' to 'reported revenue' to accurately reflect FY2026 actuals as per income statement and earnings reports. Added FY2025 revenue chunk to support the factual claim of 'substantial expansion'.
